how_far: Cleared the game: kills the full random boss roster (azure/crimson/void/voidCore, ~19.5M-50.9M HP each, 1-3 bosses per run) on 131/139 practice seed-runs (94.2%, three disjoint seed sets incl. fully fresh ones); fastest clear at step 11972 (~200s), median win ~43.7k steps; losing runs still average ~0.7-0.9 progress.
failure_modes: Ultra-thin spawn seeds: few adds means few levels (stuck ~9-12), so boss fights stretch past 5 minutes and rim/floor chip damage (~450/bullet) eventually outpaces healing
Getting herded toward walls/floor by aimed bullet fans; the rim halves escape options and grazes accumulate there
The void boss's slow closing bullet lattice (cage) can trap a short-horizon dodger; bosses ramming at ~15 px/tick do 2000-3000 contact damage
Late bosses (voidCore 50M HP) are pure DPS checks: weak drafts that survive boss 1 can still time out of healing during boss 3
lessons: Waves are time-based (wave 2 @60s, first boss @90s); boss count/variants are random per run; killing every boss = win (progress 1.0)
The ship autofires straight up, so positioning IS aiming: park under targets, lead by bullet flight time, and let pierce columns hit boss + adds together
Pierce re-hits bosses while traversing them (the single biggest boss-DPS multiplier); fire-rate/multishot/damage stack multiplicatively on top
Sustain converts dodging mistakes into chip: shield (=max HP, self-repairing), regen, lifesteal at high DPS, and full-heal picks when low are what let builds tank 50k+ damage
Draft adaptively: exp/magnet engines compound and are only worth taking early in TIME (not level); on spawn-thin runs they amplify nothing, so pivot to DPS+sustain
Bombs wipe every enemy bullet on screen (value scales with bullet count), invincibility (5s) is a license for point-blank boss DPS, LV+ drops are free levels
Dodge with exact swept rect-rect collision over a ~20-tick horizon; circle approximations cause phantom-collision paralysis in dense rain
Walls/corners/floor are local minima that turn into traps under aimed fire: escalating linger costs, committed escapes to mid-field, and a critical-HP retreat-to-calm-column mode each cut deaths

Outcomes are chaotically seed-sensitive: any tweak reshuffles later events, so changes were accepted only on 40-56-seed batch evidence; many plausible 'improvements' (closer boss range, wider margins, longer horizons, two-segment paths) measurably hurt
